prompt: A bright, cheerful 2D side-scrolling platform game scene in a polished cartoon style, showing a cute white blob-like mascot character standing on a grassy dirt platform in the lower left foreground. The character is tiny and round with a smooth white body, stubby feet, big glossy black eyes with white highlights, and a small smiling mouth, facing slightly right. The environment is a futuristic fantasy landscape under a vivid blue sky with large soft white clouds. Across the scene are exactly 5 floating rectangular hover platforms with rounded corners, white tops, orange undersides, and glowing cyan light panels on the front; one is low near the character, one is center-low, one is center-middle, one is upper-right-middle, and one is top-right. Above the middle of the scene is an arc of exactly 5 glowing ring collectibles, alternating orange and cyan, with small sparkles and tiny white particle dots tracing the jump path between them. The level includes exactly 3 visible grassy ground platforms made of lush green turf over brown soil with rounded cutaway edges: one at far left foreground, one at lower center-left where the character stands, and one at far right foreground. In the background, add rolling green hills, atmospheric blue mountains, and a whimsical futuristic city with smooth white towers and domed buildings accented with cyan-blue windows. Include exactly 3 floating islands with grass tops and small dome structures: one mid-left, one mid-right, and one tiny distant island near the right side. Decorate the foreground with small flowers and bushes. Use saturated colors, clean vector-like outlines, soft lighting, gentle bloom around glowing objects, and a playful mobile-game aesthetic reminiscent of a friendly sci-fi platformer splash screen. Wide cinematic composition, side view, no UI, no text.
